query:
SELECT s.id, s.original_name, s.status, s.pipeline_status, s.row_count, s.created_at
FROM sessions s
JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id
WHERE u.username = 'weixuejian'
ORDER BY s.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
